name: ollin-pulse
description: OLLIN Pulse desktop game show operator and public display app.

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command \"Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL='http://127.0.0.1:5173'; .\\node_modules\\.bin\\electron.cmd .\""
